title: The Stunning Gardens of Mexico's Waterfalls

scenes.text: These waterfalls look frozen in time, cascading from cliffs!
This is Hierve el Agua, located in Oaxaca, Mexico.
The rock formations are created by mineral-rich spring water flowing from the cliffs.
You can see beautiful pools at the top of the cliffs!
scenes.label: BREATHTAKING POOLS

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 Hierve el Agua, Oaxaca - Mexico. A striking site where mineral springs create the illusion of frozen waterfalls. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
